case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1033.00 US

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1033.00 US CURRENCY; $349.00 US CURRENCY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF CHLOE T. MOSQUEDA IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO MICHAEL TSAN ONLY. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,033.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF RAYMOND FONG REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AS TO JEFFREY KWAN FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO JEFFREY KWAN. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $349.00 U.S. CURRENCY IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: $349.00 U.S. CURRENCY, HELD UNDER SFPD NUMBER 110-621-657 AND SEIZED UNDER SEARCH WARRANT IN THIS CASE, BE RELEASED TO THE SFPD FOR THE PURPOSES OF DISTRIBUTING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO H&S 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
